creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vg
Date: Fri May  2 11:04:47 2014
New Revision: 352806
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352806
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352806/

Log:
  update to 10.0.5:
  - fix permission for /usr/local/bin/cbsd
  - add tmux support for remote jlogin
  - profiles for jail create script
  
  PR:		ports/189215
  Submitted by:	Oleg Ginzburg <olevole@olevole.ru> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile
  head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile	Fri May  2 11:02:42 2014	(r352805)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile	Fri May  2 11:04:47 2014	(r352806)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cbsd
-PORTVERSION=	10.0.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	10.0.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bsdstore.ru/downloads/ \
 		GH
@@ -20,7 +19,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	libssh2.so:${PORTSDIR}/secu
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	olevole
 GH_PROJECT=	cbsd
-GH_COMMIT=	dd342aa
+GH_COMMIT=	01f481c
 
 USE_RC_SUBR=	cbsdd cbsdrsyncd
 

Modified: head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo	Fri May  2 11:02:42 2014	(r352805)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo	Fri May  2 11:04:47 2014	(r352806)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cbsd-10.0.4.tar.gz) = 39aea75f35665e2d34bc3253c55b8e5db9e974684aa99bb1912e183a6b77bd5b
-SIZE (cbsd-10.0.4.tar.gz) = 359359
+SHA256 (cbsd-10.0.5.tar.gz) = d34b61ed9056ce8df6db6f283c6a78185f41ce25bde8d3f7321a12de9a041676
+SIZE (cbsd-10.0.5.tar.gz) = 358951
